page_content:
HESP829 Clinical Internship Residency (1-9 Credits)

Off-Campus, full-time (30-40 hours/week) clinical externship in Audiology at regional and national institutions.

Prerequisite: Must have completed HESP729 for two semesters; and must have completed the comprehensive exams successfully. Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department. Repeatable to: 18 credits if content differs.
